hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run graphify query <question> first (scoped subgraph). Use graphify path <A> <B> / graphify explain <concept> as needed. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture review."}}' || true
